mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_history(user_id, session_id, role, content, scene_type, order_no, created_at) VALUES(#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{sceneType}, #{orderNo}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.user_id, h.session_id, h.role, h.content, h.scene_type, h.order_no, h.created_at FROM chat_history h INNER JOIN ( SELECT session_id, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM chat_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY session_id ) latest ON h.id = latest.max_id ORDER BY h.created_at DESC
